code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    let tok = match tok_opt
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == 0
      result = "#{tok} #{tok}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{tok} #{tok}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
